The confrontation and hospital exchanges now separate idiolect and leverage more clearly without relying on dialogue tags.

summary: Revised confrontation and follow-up command dialogue to restore voice separation between Kearns and Clay, reduce shared polished-bureaucratic cadence, and align contractions/register with style-bible pressure rules while preserving chapter continuity and scene outcomes.
